calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgement, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Rorabaugh, Esq. 714-617-9600 for Defendant Financial Casualy & Surety through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FINANCIAL CASUALTY & SURETY, INC.'s Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgement, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail.

Defendant Financial Casualty & Surety, Inc.'s motion to set aside summary judgment, discharge forfeiture and exonerate bail is granted. The People filed a statement of non-opposition.

Order is signed with the additional language on any interest accrued. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
